summary: The walk-in wardrobe appears newly decorated and generally in very good order, with clean white walls/doors, light grey carpet and a modern fitted wardrobe arrangement. Overall presentation is tidy and uncluttered, with only minor cosmetic marks visible on the wall and door edge in close-up images. No significant damage is visible in the room photos.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Smooth white ceiling with recessed downlight positions visible; no fittings shown in operation.

items.name: Walls
items.description: Emulsioned white walls throughout the wardrobe area.
defects: Light scuffing/abrasion visible on wall surface in close-up, mid-height area
Small faint mark/spotting visible on wall section by door

items.name: Skirting boards
items.description: White painted skirting boards around the room perimeter.

items.name: Door
items.description: White painted internal hinged door with black lever handle and black round escutcheon/lock set.
defects: Small chip/mark at lower edge near the latch side
Minor wear/marking around handle area visible in close-up

items.name: Door frame and architrave
items.description: White painted door linings and architraves.

items.name: Flooring
items.description: Light grey carpet within the wardrobe area.
defects: Pronounced pile shading/flattening visible in central walking area and at thresholds

items.name: Threshold strip
items.description: Metal transition strip between carpet and adjoining wood-effect flooring.

items.name: Adjacent flooring visible through doorway
items.description: Light oak-effect laminate flooring visible outside the wardrobe doorway.

items.name: Internal wardrobe unit
items.description: Fitted wardrobe in wood-effect laminate finish with hinged white front doors and internal shelf/rail arrangement.

items.name: Wardrobe doors x3
items.description: Three fitted wardrobe front doors, white with wood-effect surrounding frame, fitted with metal hinges.

items.name: Wardrobe hanging rail
items.description: Single metal hanging rail inside the wardrobe, with multiple plastic hangers present.

items.name: Wardrobe shelf/cubbie
items.description: Upper internal shelf/open cubby within the fitted wardrobe, wood-effect laminate finish.

items.name: Pillows stored on shelf
items.description: White quilted pillows/soft bedding items stored on the upper wardrobe shelf.

items.name: Plastic hangers
items.description: Assorted pink and clear plastic clothes hangers on the wardrobe rail.
